case_title: QUO VADIS TOUR LINES VS. ROYAL INTERNATIONAL TOURS, INC et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-03-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-24-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF QUO VADIS TOUR LINES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROYAL INTERNATIONAL TOURS, INC $5,866.79 PRINCIPAL, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,010.80 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,537.59, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-14-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT SONDHEIM, RICHARD
